prerequisites: A Fulcrum account with API access. The Fulcrum REST API is part of the Developer Pack add-on, which can be added to any plan and is included with certain plans.
A Fulcrum API token (Authorization). Tokens are created from your Fulcrum account using your Fulcrum username and password and are tied to an organization.
The api_key config value, which is the Fulcrum API token used to authenticate every request.

authMethods.name: API token (X-ApiToken)
authMethods.summary: Fulcrum authenticates each request with an API token. Supply the token in the api_key field. Fulcrum sends it in the X-ApiToken HTTP request header (it may alternatively be passed as a query string parameter) against the base URL https://api.fulcrumapp.com.

setupSteps.title: Confirm API access on your plan
setupSteps.body: Make sure your Fulcrum plan includes the Developer Pack. The REST API is part of the Developer Pack add-on, which can be added to any plan and is included with certain Fulcrum plans.

setupSteps.title: Create a Fulcrum API token
setupSteps.body: Generate an API token (an Authorization) in Fulcrum. Tokens are created against your organization using your Fulcrum username and password and can be given a note describing the token's use. Copy the generated token value; it is what the connector uses to authenticate.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token as api_key
setupSteps.body: Enter the Fulcrum API token in the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it on each request to https://api.fulcrumapp.com in the X-ApiToken header to read forms, records, and other objects from your Fulcrum organization.

sources.title: Fulcrum REST API Introduction (base URL, plan requirement, JSON headers)
Fulcrum Authorizations API (API tokens created via username/password; token as header or query string)
Fulcrum Create Record reference (X-ApiToken security scheme, in: header)
